title: The Clocks Of Death
content:
In a life where the clocks
    Are slow or fast,
    It is a pleasant thing
    To die together
    As we are dying.

    From the Japanese of the Wife of Bes-syo Ko-saburo Naga-haru, (sixteenth century).
meaning:
"The Clocks Of Death" is a quintessential example of Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator)'s signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
